notes: Proto-Germanic gutaz → EN good / DE gut
Proto-Germanic lubją → EN love / DE Liebe
Proto-Germanic hailagaz → EN holy / DE heilig
Proto-Germanic starkaz → EN stark / DE stark
from causa → because/porque/weil — marks reason clauses
from tempus → when/quando/wenn/quand — marks time clauses
from optimus → ótimo/optimal/best — positive superlative scale
from pessimus → péssimo/worst/pésimo — negative extreme scale
CJK ideogram 愛 — shared in ZH/JA(ai)/KO(ae) — same root as amor
CJK ideogram 悲 — shared in ZH/JA(hi)/KO(bi) — same root as tristis
CJK ideogram 喜 — shared in ZH/JA(ki)/KO(hui) — same root as felix
CJK ideogram 怒 — shared in ZH/JA(do)/KO(no) — same root as ira
CJK ideogram 美 — shared in ZH/JA(bi)/KO(mi) — same root as bellus
CJK ideogram 善 — shared in ZH/JA(zen)/KO(seon) — same root as bonus
CJK ideogram 悪 — shared in ZH/JA(aku)/KO(ak) — same root as malus
CJK compound 希(rare)+望(hope/desire) — shared ZH/JA(kibou) — same root as sperare
